babe wake up.

@Base44 just dropped one-click MIGRATION from WordPress, Lovable, Salesforce, Shopify, Bolt & Replit.  

Your data, structure, everything transfers instantly. 

https://t.co/3bIliaHr3R

profile_bio.description: Generalist | AI | Tech | Startups ▪︎ Locked in ▪︎ Building https://t.co/fRlOjnbxgz
Create fully-functional apps in minutes. If you can describe it, you can build it.

quoted_tweet.text:
Introducing: Base44’s new platform migration feature.

If your needs have outgrown your current software, you can now bring your projects from other platforms into Base44 in a single click.
This includes your Salesforce pipeline, Shopify catalog or WordPress site. Also whatever you’ve built on Lovable, Bolt, or Replit.

To celebrate the launch, anyone who completes migration by May 5th, 12am ET gets 25 free credits added to their account!

profile_bio.description: Create fully-functional apps in minutes. If you can describe it, you can build it.

kept.text:
For over six months we remain undefeated. 

Unheard of in the AI wars of today. 

Replit has been leading Design Arena's App Builder leaderboard for over six months.

Consistently across major model provider release, our harness has kept ahead of other alternatives in the market in its ability to output beautiful artifacts. 

We've taken those learnings and brought them over to Replit Slides.

It's the only product where the output is truly stunning.

Just a year ago you would've had to pay $2500 to a designer for one of these decks and waited days for back and fourth.

Today the same power is available to everyone in minutes.

Try it!

kept.text:
"I don't believe in technical moats."

Michele Catasta (@pirroh), President of Replit, at Google Cloud Next:

Next 12 months, obsess on product-market fit. If you don't get it, make it your life mission.

Everything else follows. Your customers will tell you the technical requirements. You'll decide what to be great at and what to use a vendor for.

From the "Future of AI: How Startups Build Competitive Moats" panel at Google Cloud Next.
